name: architrave
description: Storybook-first, contract-first, YAGNI-gated agent crew for UI, backend, full-stack features, plan-only infrastructure, optional read-only runtime observation, and durable learning/audit artifacts. Grounds UI in Storybook + tokens, backend in architecture docs + contracts, ops in runtime evidence, and gates every change with deterministic checks plus two independent judge families. Retargeted per repo via architrave.config.json.
